message:
fix(a11y): wrap 5 large card components in DynamicCardErrorBoundary (#6216 part 1) (#6237)

Auto-QA #6216 flagged 10 complex card components rendering 200+ lines
without an ErrorBoundary, so a runtime error inside them would crash
the entire dashboard. This PR wraps 5 of them in
DynamicCardErrorBoundary using the same pattern EventStream already
uses (rename internal to <Name>Internal, add a thin <Name> wrapper
that returns the boundary). The other 5 (KagentTopology,
KagentAgentDiscovery, KagentModelProviders, KagentAgentFleet,
KagentToolRegistry) are deferred to a follow-up to keep this PR
under the 'size S < 50 lines' guidance the auto-QA report requested.

Wrapped in this PR (5 cards, 353+254+205+274+252 = 1338 LOC of game
loop / topology / heatmap code now fault-isolated):
  - PodSweeper.tsx (353 lines, game loop)
  - ClusterComparison.tsx (254 lines, GPU node table)
  - FluentdStatus.tsx (205 lines, log shipping status)
  - GPUNamespaceAllocations.tsx (274 lines, paginated table)
  - ResourceUsage.tsx (252 lines, gauge dashboard)

Each file change is +6 LOC (import + comment + wrapper export). Total
diff ~30 LOC across 5 files, well under the size-S target.

Verified: `npm run build` clean.

Closes #6216 (partial — see PR body for the 5-card follow-up note).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
